name: Count 427
short_description: Urgent Recruitment! 100,000 Yen Daily Wage! Easy Job, Just Press a Button.
detailed_description:
Earn 100,000 yen per night! Late-night traffic survey part-time job!

A part-time job counting passing vehicles along Japan's roads with little pedestrian traffic.
It's a simple task, but the reward is an astonishing 100,000 yen!?

However, letting your guard down is not an option. Eerie anomalies lurk in the darkness of the night!

The anomalies will gradually erode your sanity...
Take photos to quickly make the anomalies disappear!

Maintain your focus on counting vehicles and your sanity as you confront the anomalies!

▼Traffic Survey

Press the button each time a vehicle passes.
Pressing the button will count the vehicle. Missing any is strictly forbidden, okay?

▼Collect Anomalies

Your sanity decreases while anomalies are present. It's possible to make them disappear by taking photos!
